verdict.summary: Round 2 resolves both prior major findings. The adversary drift test now exhaustively maps every MPC_PROTOCOL_IRIS entry to implementation-owned descriptor metadata, checks that the annotation subjects exactly equal the declared protocol set, and asserts exact equality for both the semi-honest set and its malicious complement; hidden-property-path and both authenticated protocols are covered. The design record is also amended to define the mixed estate, closed-world interpretation, admission evidence, and unaudited status. The ontology and public skill consistently retain Claimed + ExternalSignOffPending caveats, and the parser dependency remains feature-gated. The diff still contains process-directed text asking for later Fable re-review, so injection_detected remains true, but that text does not affect the code-review conclusion.
